report.summary: Cycle-close v8: 332 PUBLISHED_PAGES (+1 from v7 — Hyperliquid HIP-3 page confirmed live), PUBLISH_QUEUE now empty, 438-file staged batch unchanged, all P0 blockers carried forward.

sections.title: QA — Page & Build Health
items: ✅ PUBLISHED_PAGES: 332 confirmed — up 1 from v6 (331). Delta: /learn/hyperliquid-hip3-tokenized-futures-guide promoted this cycle by Publish Queue
✅ PUBLISH_QUEUE: Empty — all queued pages have been promoted. No pages waiting to ship

✅ Hyperliquid HIP-3 page (newly published): page.tsx exists, title tag present (57 chars), meta description present, OG/Twitter card metadata confirmed, 4 structured data schemas (Article + FAQ + HowTo)
✅ /learn/ethereum-2026-upgrade-roadmap: page.tsx exists, SEO metadata confirmed, JSON-LD schemas in place
✅ /learn/defi-options-trading-guide: page.tsx exists, SEO metadata confirmed, OptionsPnLCalculator component embedded
⚠️ Breadcrumb missing on /learn/hyperliquid-hip3-tokenized-futures-guide — same known gap as prior cycle, no BreadcrumbNav component wired
⚠️ published-pages.ts audit: 100 of 332 slugs still missing page.tsx — unchanged from v6 baseline. No new scaffolding gaps introduced this cycle
⚠️ src/app/badges/page.tsx, src/app/courses/page.tsx, src/app/courses/[slug]/page.tsx staged for deletion — these routes will 404 on next deploy. Intentional?
⚠️ TypeScript baseline: 57 non-blocking errors in structured-data.examples.ts + AICourseRecommendations.tsx (ignoreBuildErrors: true in next.config.ts)
ℹ️ Local npm run build blocked by VM OOM — unchanged environment constraint; Vercel build is authoritative

sections.title: Data Engineer — API Health
items: ✅ All 6 public API route files present: /api/prices, /api/defi-yields, /api/fear-greed, /api/trending, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance
✅ Cache TTLs confirmed correct: prices (60s / 120s SWR), defi-yields (300s / 600s SWR), fear-greed (600s / 1200s SWR), trending (300s / 600s SWR), market-dominance (300s / 600s SWR)
✅ X-Cache-Source headers present on /api/prices and /api/market-dominance for observability
✅ Fallback data present on /api/prices and /api/market-dominance

⚠️ DEPLOYMENT GAP: 5 of 6 routes staged but NOT committed — only /api/market-metrics is live in production. /api/prices, /api/defi-yields, /api/fear-greed, /api/trending, /api/market-dominance are NOT serving traffic yet
⚠️ No hardcoded fallback data on /api/defi-yields, /api/fear-greed, /api/trending, /api/market-metrics — cold-start or upstream outage yields error response
⚠️ X-Cache-Source headers missing on /api/defi-yields, /api/fear-greed, /api/trending, /api/market-metrics — no observability on cache hit rate
🔴 Rate limiting: 0/6 public API routes protected — checkRateLimit() wired only to /api/health. FOMC window opens Mar 18 (T-2 from today) — traffic spike risk is HIGH
ℹ️ Live HTTP checks to degen0x.com/api/* blocked in sandbox; production health unverifiable directly

sections.title: DevOps — Deployment Status
items: ✅ Last deployed commit: 1b4a15e 'Fix: commit missing ecosystem + courses routes and fix stargate JSX error' — no new commit or deploy this cycle
✅ middleware.ts staged change is minor: removes /learn/solana-alpenglow-guide and /learn/onchain-finance-onfi-guide from PILLAR_PAGES set — reduces CDN cache tier on those 2 pages if committed

🔴 CRITICAL (CARRY-OVER): Staged next.config.ts drops output: 'standalone' and bumps staticGenerationMaxConcurrency 4→8. Committing this BREAKS Vercel serverless deployment. Must run: git restore --staged next.config.ts
🔴 Staged deletions: badges/page.tsx + courses/page.tsx + courses/[slug]/page.tsx + courses.ts — these routes 404 on next deploy. Verify intent before committing
⚠️ 438 staged files remain uncommitted — full production gap grows each cycle without commit + deploy
⚠️ Vercel trial: ~7 days remaining (estimate; 1 additional day elapsed since v6). Jefe payment action required
ℹ️ No new Vercel deployment triggered this cycle — production URL stable at last-known-good state
